description.value:
You can internalize a large amount of information when connected to the infosphere. When you successfully @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Access Infosphere] about a specific organization, culture, or region, you can adopt facets of the culture you researched into your personality unit to mimic their habits and sensibilities. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Charisma-based skill checks against creatures related to the culture for 1 hour after you Access Infosphere. You can only adopt the facets for one group of creatures at a time, and if you adopt facets from a new group, the effects of a previous one immediately end.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Cultural Consumption]
